task_objective: Multi-Gesture Nail Try-On & 9-View 3x3 - Map Image 2 hand+nail design onto Image 1's 9 hand gestures (ONLY gesture changes, hand identity + nail design FULLY PRESERVED)

input_assets.gesture_reference: Image 1 9-Gesture Grid - 9 distinct hand gestures (finger positions, wrist angle, palm orientation, hand placement, camera angle, composition) - ONLY provide gestures
input_assets.hand_nail_image: Image 2 Hand+Nail (VARIABLE) - Hand skin tone, nail shape, nail design (colors, patterns, textures, embellishments, 3D elements) - FULLY PRESERVED, ZERO deviation

workflow.step_1: Extract all 9 hand gestures from Image 1 + analyze Image 2 hand identity & nail design details (base color, tip style, gradient, embellishments, 3D elements, aesthetic)
workflow.step_2: Map Image 2 hand+nail onto each of 9 gestures, ONLY gesture changes to Image 1, hand identity & nail design 100% preserved
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 views, assemble 3x3 grid matching Image 1 layout, consistent lighting & background

outputs.view_1: Gesture 1 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 1, exact finger positions & camera angle
outputs.view_2: Gesture 2 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 2, exact finger positions & camera angle
outputs.view_3: Gesture 3 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 3, exact finger positions & camera angle
outputs.view_4: Gesture 4 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 4, exact finger positions & camera angle
outputs.view_5: Gesture 5 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 5, exact finger positions & camera angle
outputs.view_6: Gesture 6 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 6, exact finger positions & camera angle
outputs.view_7: Gesture 7 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 7, exact finger positions & camera angle
outputs.view_8: Gesture 8 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 8, exact finger positions & camera angle
outputs.view_9: Gesture 9 - Image 2 hand+nail in Image 1 gesture 9, exact finger positions & camera angle

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; ALL 9 gestures MUST be identical to Image 1 — zero deviation in finger positions, wrist angle, palm orientation, camera angle
Hand identity + nail design MUST remain exactly as Image 2 — consistent skin tone, nail shape, colors, patterns, embellishments across all 9 views
Natural hand mechanics in each gesture; realistic proportions; consistent lighting & background across all views
SFW; realistic nail texture (gloss, matte, shimmer); NO oily shine; NO oversaturation; All 9 gestures must be generated — no missing or merged gestures
Premium 3x3 - matching Image 1 grid layout, cinematic grading, luxury white space
